_source: Machine-readable mirror of coach/lab_tests.md (lab-measured, 7 Jan 2026 NSC). lab_tests.md is the human authority; update BOTH together when a new lab test arrives. Scripts read this file so HR/pace numbers live in one place.
_hr_bands_note: On-watch target ranges per session type. `high` is the cap that triggers the alert. Derived from the lab zones above + method calibration.
_pace_zones_note: Per-km pace windows (fast/slow as M:SS). Reference for session design; a given week may pick a conservative slice. subthreshold = method-calibrated NSA sweet spot.
